description_long: This is a stylized brown bear doll with articulated limbs and a rounded, segmented body. The doll features a prominent black bow tie and a small black top hat perched on its head, giving it a formal, playful appearance. Its face is characterized by large, round eyes, a black nose, and a slightly protruding snout with visible nostrils and freckles. The ears are circular and set high on the head, while the hands and feet are simplified with rounded shapes and minimal detailing. The joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees are clearly defined, suggesting possible poseability. The surface has a matte, slightly textured finish, and the overall build appears to be made of molded plastic or vinyl.
description: A brown bear doll with a black top hat and bow tie, featuring articulated limbs and a matte, slightly textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face, black bow tie, top hat, and full frontal articulation of arms and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's profile, protruding snout, and the rounded segmentation of the limbs and torso.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth back, rounded ears, and the articulation points at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, snout, and limb segmentation.
attribute_clothing_style: Classic formal costume with a black bow tie and a small black top hat, reminiscent of vintage entertainer or circus performer attire.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent and angled outward, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with wide, open eyes, slightly raised eyebrows, and a closed mouth.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and covered in brown material.
